title: hieracium balbisianum subsp. subcuspidatum
intro: Hieracium balbisianum subsp. subcuspidatum, also known as a lesser hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its ability to treat wounds, fever, and digestive issues. Hieracium balbisianum subsp. subcuspidatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
